$comment: Explicit hand-type-name -> real-table-name mapping used by scripts/schema-drift-gate-check.ts. Deliberately NOT inferred from pluralization (e.g. 'MembershipPlan' -> 'membership_plans' is not a mechanical rule the parser can derive reliably) — every hand type in database.ts that models a real table must have an entry here, or it is invisible to the drift gate.
